title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 264.101 - Penalties
text:
264.101.  Penalties. — Any person who shall violate any provision or requirement of sections 264.011 to 264.101, or who shall forge, counterfeit, deface, destroy, or wrongfully use any certificate provided for in sections 264.011 to 264.101, shall be deemed guilty of a class A misdemeanor.
(L. 1978 S.B. 683 § 10, A.L. 1985 H.B. 180)
